title: Koth (disambiguation)
content:
'''Koth''' could refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Eeth Koth]]''', [[Jedi Master]] of the [[Jedi High Council]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Koth Barak]]''', [[Midshipman/Legends|midshipman]] aboard the ''[[Adamantine]]''
*[[Eeth Koth/Legends|'''Eeth Koth''']], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] of the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|High Council]]
*'''[[Koth Melan]]''', [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Spymaster/Legends|spymaster]]
*'''[[Koth Vortena]]''', a [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] from [[Zakuul]]
